channel_alignment_why_2_lines: The rewrite is clear, factual, and compliant with veterinary and ecommerce guidelines.
It effectively prioritizes species, benefits, and product type without overclaiming or keyword stuffing.
general_remarks: Ensure all product identifiers (like brand and pack size) are consistently presented for SEO clarity.
Avoid redundant phrasing to enhance readability and maintain scan-friendly style.
The rewrite correctly removes absolute claims, improving compliance and trust.
Mentioning the French origin upfront enhances brand confidence for pet owners.
Some arguments could be more aligned with user benefits rather than formulation facts.
Use short sentences and bullet points consistently to improve accessibility for the target audience.

per_field_remarks.Titre produit: Title is clear and concise, improved keyword order without overstuffing.
per_field_remarks.Titre court du produit (60 caractères ma: Short title well adapted for channel length constraints and clarity.
per_field_remarks.Slug: Slug optimized for SEO with clear product and benefit mention.
per_field_remarks.META Title: META title integrates keywords well and is more descriptive.
per_field_remarks.META Description: META description includes call to action and mentions key benefits clearly.
per_field_remarks.Description courte (...) 175 caractères: No change; still appropriate and concise.
per_field_remarks.Description du produit unique/site 400 c: Condensed and focused description improves clarity and compliance.
per_field_remarks.Description courte 600 caractères: Expanded benefits with compliant claims enhance user trust and SEO.
per_field_remarks.Description longue: Comprehensive, well structured with warnings and scientific support.
per_field_remarks.Conseils d'utilisation uniques (SEO): No change; thorough and properly detailed instructions.
per_field_remarks.Mots clés: Keywords filtered to relevant terms, reducing noise and improving targeting.
per_field_remarks.Argu 1: More precise claim on formulation but less direct on benefits.
per_field_remarks.Argu 2: Balanced benefit claims; avoids overclaiming and vague absolutes.
per_field_remarks.Argu 3: Clear usage duration claim adapted for user understanding.
per_field_remarks.Argu 4: Risk-compliant claim, improves safety messaging though less promotional.
per_field_remarks.Argu 5: Improved statement of origin enhances brand reliability.
